suggested_fixes: Replace y.add_(at::matmul(Ac, t)) with y = y + at::matmul(Ac, t) to support automatic differentiation if needed.
If performance is critical, consider implementing a custom CUDA kernel that fuses the operations to reduce memory bandwidth and kernel launch overhead.
warnings: The use of add_() modifies the result tensor in-place, which may break autograd if gradients are required. Consider using y = y + ... instead for full gradient support.
The candidate does not implement any custom CUDA kernel or result caching; performance may be suboptimal compared to fused approaches.
